name: 42" Rowan Mixed Material Round Dining Table Natural Wood/Black Metal - Threshold™
description:
Set up a sophisticated dining setting with the 42-Inch Rowan Mixed Material Round Dining Table from Threshold™. This round dining table features a brown wooden tabletop with clean lines along with four metal legs in a black powder-coated finish for easy integration into a wide variety of decor styles. Add coordinating chairs to create a perfect dining setup.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
